subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath chosen and singled out holy, divine souls and luminous, human realities, and made them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اصطفی و اجتبی نفوسا قدسیه رحمانیه و حقائق انسیه نورانیه و جعلها
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab
